title: Cyrix 486SLC CPU: Introduced April 13,1992
content:
On April 13,  1992, Cyrix debuted its 486SLC CPU. Cyrix didn’t have its own fabrication plants so they relied on other chipmakers, such as SGS Thomson and Texas Instruments, to manufacture the chips. Part of the agreement allowed TI to

The post Cyrix 486SLC CPU: Introduced April 13,1992 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
